{"step_by_step_thinking": "The patient presents with high-grade fever, inspiratory stridor, and difficulty swallowing with drooling, which are classic symptoms of epiglottitis. The treatment for epiglottitis includes general airway management, nebulized epinephrine, and antibiotics like ceftriaxone. Among the options, nebulized racemic epinephrine is a standard treatment for epiglottitis to reduce swelling and maintain airway patency.", "answer_choice": "A"}
